name: energy_research_classroom_monitoring_mesa_st_lt
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Energy Research, the situation tagged internally around energy research classroom monitoring mesa st lt has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Luc Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Luc Ishikawa, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Energy Research. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Soren Berg
agents.identity: I am Soren Berg, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Energy Research. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with long term.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to long term to preserve operational short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Luc Ishikawa must choose under short term versus long term. What does Luc Ishikawa do?
